hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -qE 'git commit|git push' && { cd "$PWD"; MATCHES=$(git grep -rl 'OEM Activation System' -- '*.php' '*.ts' '*.tsx' '*.json' '*.ps1' '*.cmd' '*.md' '*.yml' 2>/dev/null | head -10); if [ -n "$MATCHES" ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"⚠️ Old branding found! Files still containing 'OEM Activation System': $(echo $MATCHES | tr '\n' ', '). Please rename to KeyGate.\"}"; fi; } || true
